quotes.text: C++ is a horrible language. It's made more horrible by the fact that a lot of substandard programmers use it, to the point where it's much much easier to generate total and utter crap with it.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: There are only two kinds of languages: the ones people complain about and the ones nobody uses.
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup
quotes.source: The Design and Evolution of C++

quotes.text: A language that doesn't affect the way you think about programming, is not worth knowing.
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: The best time to learn a new language is when you need it. The worst is when you think it'll make you a better programmer.
quotes.author: based
